children.heading: Affected source
children.label: 1 Affected source
children.text: The term “affected source” shall have the meaning given such term in subchapter IV–A.

children.label: A
children.text: A major source as defined in .section 7412 of this title

children.label: B
children.text: A major stationary source as defined in or part D of subchapter I.section 7602 of this title

children.heading: Schedule of compliance
children.label: 3 Schedule of compliance
children.text: The term “schedule of compliance” means a schedule of remedial measures, including an enforceable sequence of actions or operations, leading to compliance with an applicable implementation plan, emission standard, emission limitation, or emission prohibition.

children.heading: Permitting authority
children.label: 4 Permitting authority
children.text: The term “permitting authority” means the Administrator or the air pollution control agency authorized by the Administrator to carry out a permit program under this subchapter.
